sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
🌱 Green Aventurine Wishlist Vase by Studd Muffyn

Turn your wishes into reality with the Green Aventurine Wishlist Vase by Studd Muffyn. Known as the “Crystal of Opportunity”, Green Aventurine is cherished for attracting luck, prosperity, and positive new beginnings. This handcrafted vase allows you to write down your desires, intentions, or dreams and place them inside—transforming it into a sacred wish-holder that aligns your energy with abundance.

A stunning piece of crystal décor, the Green Aventurine Wishlist Vase is more than just ornamental—it’s a powerful tool for manifestation, self-growth, and spiritual connection. Whether for your own intention-setting rituals or as a meaningful gift, this vase is a beautiful reminder that your dreams are always within reach. 🌿💫

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
• Crafted with Green Aventurine elements known for luck & growth energy

• Topped with a natural Pyrite geode symbolizing wealth & abundance

• Designed as a wishlist manifestation vase for intention setting

• Premium décor piece ideal for desks, shelves & personal spaces

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
• Green Aventurine Crystal Chips Embedded in Vase (Luck & Growth Energy)

• Natural Pyrite Geode Top (Wealth & Abundance Energy)

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
Manifest Your Dreams – Place written wishes or intentions inside to amplify manifestation energy.

Attract Luck & Prosperity – Aventurine is believed to invite abundance, success, and financial growth.

Emotional Healing & Positivity – Promotes balance, harmony, and optimism in everyday life.

Supports New Beginnings – Encourages confidence in decision-making and fresh starts.

Sacred Décor Accent – Functions as both a powerful crystal tool and an elegant home accessory.

Meaningful Gifting Idea – Perfect for loved ones embarking on new journeys or manifesting dreams.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Desk/Workspace: Place it on your study or office desk to enhance focus, decision-making, and strategic clarity.

Home Décor: Keep it in your living room or entrance to invite prosperity, harmony, and protection into the home.

Meditation/Healing Corner: Use it during meditation or energy practices to channel strength, confidence, and abundance.

Gifting: Present it as a meaningful gift to inspire leadership, success, and positive energy in loved ones.

Rituals & Intentions: Light a candle beside the plate while setting intentions for wealth, empowerment, and protection.
